title: Senior Software Engineer - HealthifyMe Consulting Pvt Ltd - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - HealthifyMe Consulting Pvt Ltd - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Join the HealthifyMe Consulting Pvt Ltd family as a Senior Software Engineer in Navi Mumbai. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About HealthifyMe Consulting Pvt Ltd:
HealthifyMe Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HealthifyMe Consulting Pvt Ltd!
